user.title: Configure Home Mind
user.description: Enter the URL of your Home Mind API server. Don't have a server? Get a hosted one at [{cloud_url}]({cloud_url}).

data_description.api_token: Required for Home Mind Cloud. Leave empty for self-hosted setups without authentication.
data_description.user_id: Used to namespace memories per user. Leave as 'default' unless you have multiple users.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Home Mind API. Make sure it's running and accessible.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API token. Check your token on the Home Mind Cloud dashboard.

init.title: Home Mind Options
init.description: Configure optional settings for Home Mind.

data_description.custom_prompt: Custom instructions for the AI personality and behavior. Leave empty to use the default.
